subcodes.first_line: Verily, the trees lament, and the clods cry out, and the stones weep for this Wronged One Who hath suffered in the path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الشجر ینوح و المدر یصیح و الحجر یبکی لهذا المظلوم الذی ورد علیه فی سبیل
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
